document_filename: Senus PLC Direct Listing Launch Press Release.pdf
notes: This is a press release announcing a direct listing, not formal financial statements. The only P&L item extracted is revenue of €836,991 for the year ended 30 June 2025 (FY25). The document mentions gross proceeds of €1.1 million from a Private Placement, but this is a financing activity, not a financial statement line item. Additional KPIs related to the listing (share count, admission price, market cap, and customer accounts) have been recorded. No balance sheet, cash flow statement, or detailed P&L items are present in this document.
